# DahNAY

> DahNAY is a global logistics and supply chain solutions company headquartered in India, providing industry-specific freight services powered by technology and expertise.

## Company

DahNAY delivers end-to-end logistics solutions across air freight, sea freight, road transportation, customs clearance, last-mile delivery, and project logistics. The company serves 10+ industry verticals including automotive, FMCG, energy, renewables, and retail across South Asia and major international trade corridors.

## Services

- **Air Freight**: Fast, reliable international air cargo with real-time tracking and customs support
- **Sea Freight**: FCL and LCL ocean freight with global carrier partnerships
- **Customs Clearance**: Expert customs brokerage, documentation, and duty management
- **Domestic Trucking**: FTL and LTL road freight across India
- **Last Mile Delivery**: Final-leg delivery with end-to-end visibility
- **Project Logistics**: Heavy-lift, oversized cargo, and multi-modal transport
- **Reverse Logistics**: Returns management and remanufacturing logistics
- **Road Transportation**: Full-load and part-load trucking across South Asia
- **Ecommerce Fulfilment**: Warehousing, pick-and-pack, and order fulfilment
- **Time-Critical Delivery**: Urgent shipment solutions, 24/7

## Industries Served

Automotive, Renewables, Machinery, Retail & Apparel, Natural Rubber, White Goods, Energy Oil & Gas, Food & Agro, FMCG, Paper & Pulp, Construction Materials

## Technology Solutions

- **DahNAY Lines**: Carrier and shipping line management platform
- **DahNAY Logistics**: End-to-end supply chain visibility and freight management
- **DahNAY Ports & Infrastructure**: Port operations and terminal management solutions
